(Z=drds
Z>dtdu
JsonCodeGenz
Builds JSON document representing MIB module supplied
       in form of an Abstract Syntax Tree on input.
       Instance of this class is supposed to be passed to *MibCompiler*,
       the rest is internal to *MibCompiler*.
    )
